name: First Federal Savings And Loan Association Of Greene Co
description_short: Community bank serving Greene and Fayette counties in Pennsylvania and West Virginia with branches, online banking, and lending products including mortgages and personal loans.
description_long:
First Federal Savings and Loan Association of Greene County (FFGC) is a regional community bank headquartered in Waynesburg, Pennsylvania. Founded to serve the Greene County area, the institution has expanded to multiple locations across Greene and Fayette counties in Pennsylvania, with a dedicated mortgage subsidiary serving West Virginia customers. The bank maintains both full-service branch locations and drive-thru facilities to accommodate customer preferences.

FFGC offers a comprehensive suite of banking products and services including checking and savings accounts, online banking with mobile app access, ATM access, safe deposit boxes, and loan services. Their lending portfolio includes personal loans (recently introduced), student loans through a partnership with PA Forward Student Loans by PHEAA, and home mortgage services through First Greene Mortgage. The bank also provides financial calculators, check reordering, and bill payment services through their digital banking platform.

The institution distinguishes itself through its community focus and multi-location presence across two counties, offering both lobby and drive-thru options at most branches. FFGC is actively modernizing its security infrastructure, implementing one-time passcodes via email and phasing out older multi-factor authentication methods by March 31, 2026. The bank emphasizes accessibility, with AudioEye integration on its website to support customers with assistive technology needs.

As a traditional community bank, FFGC serves regional customers seeking personalized banking services and local branch access. The institution competes with larger regional and national banks but differentiates through community presence and relationship-based banking. Customer experience depends on branch location and service type, with some locations offering limited services (drive-thru only or lobby only).
services: Online banking with mobile app access
ATM access across multiple branch locations
Student loans through PA Forward Student Loans by PHEAA partnership
Mortgage services and home loans through First Greene Mortgage subsidiary
Lost or stolen debit card replacement (24/7 phone support)
pros: Multiple branch locations (at least 5 documented) across Greene and Fayette counties with both lobby and drive-thru options
Extended drive-thru hours until 6:00 PM on weekdays at select locations, plus Saturday morning service
Safe deposit boxes available at main Waynesburg location for secure document storage
Personal loans newly introduced as a dedicated product for customer needs
Student loan partnership with PA Forward Student Loans by PHEAA providing alternative financing options
Dedicated First Greene Mortgage subsidiary for West Virginia customers seeking home loans
Modern online banking platform with mobile app, bill pay, paperless options, and enhanced security features
Website accessibility features including AudioEye toolbar for customers using assistive technologies
cons: Limited service offerings at some locations - Waynesburg Main Office has lobby only with no drive-thru, while Waynesburg Drive-Thru has no lobby access
ATM at Waynesburg Main Office does not accept deposits, limiting functionality compared to full-service ATMs
Geographic service area limited to Greene and Fayette counties in Pennsylvania and West Virginia, not a nationwide option
Phasing out familiar MFA security challenge questions by March 31, 2026, requiring customers to adapt to new authentication methods
No information provided on deposit rates, lending rates details, or competitive comparison to larger regional banks
best_for: Residents of Greene County, Pennsylvania seeking community bank services with multiple local branch options
Homebuyers in West Virginia interested in mortgage services through the dedicated First Greene Mortgage subsidiary
Customers needing extended drive-thru hours (until 6 PM weekdays, 12 PM Saturdays) at convenient locations
Students exploring private loan options through the PA Forward Student Loans partnership
diagnosis: Best for residents of Greene and Fayette counties in Pennsylvania and West Virginia seeking traditional community bank services with multiple local branches and personalized customer relationships. Main caveat: service offerings vary significantly by location (some branches are lobby-only or drive-thru-only), so customers should verify available services at their nearest branch before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
